case_title: LANGHORNE TAMARA DBA TL DESIGNS VS BANER WILLIAM DBA BANER SECURITIES CORP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $165.00 FILED BY LANGHORNE TAMARA DBA TL DESIGNS AS TO DEFENDANT BANER WILLIAM DBA BANER SECURITIES CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANER WILLIAM DBA BANER SECURITIES CORP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANGHORNE TAMARA DBA TL DESIGNS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANER WILLIAM DBA BANER SECURITIES CORP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BANER WILLIAM DBA BANER SECURITIES CORP
